entry.title: Self-Supervised Flow Matching for Scalable Multi-Modal Synthesis
entry.summary: A modality-agnostic, self-supervised flow matching framework for image, video, and audio generation.

entry.title: FLUX.2: Analyzing and Enhancing the Latent Space of FLUX – Representation Comparison
entry.summary: A comprehensive study comparing different autoencoder representations for diffusion models, including SD-VAE, RAE, FLUX.1 and FLUX.2.

entry.title: FLUX.1 Kontext: Flow Matching for In-Context Image Generation and Editing in Latent Space
entry.summary: FLUX.1 Kontext is a unified model for image editing and generation in context, achieving fast, state-of-the-art results with strong consistency and quality.
